focus: Recurring reputation, hiring, interview, resume, portfolio, and status-building loops.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 1 for Career / Status / Social Proof. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring reputation, hiring, interview, resume, portfolio, and status-building loops.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Career Signal Compounding Loop
raw_candidates.description: A system for turning repeated work outputs into visible career signals that compound over time.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated career signal compounding loop workflow inside the career / status / social proof wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Career Signal Compounding Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next career signal compounding loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Career progress increasingly depends on public proof and discoverable signal, not just private competence.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Career progress increasingly depends on public proof and discoverable signal, not just private competence.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 2 for Career / Status / Social Proof. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring reputation, hiring, interview, resume, portfolio, and status-building loops.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: Creator Public Wins Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for packaging small public wins into momentum-building updates, receipts, and compounding reputation.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated creator public wins loop workflow inside the career / status / social proof wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Creator Public Wins Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next creator public wins loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Public momentum compounds when people repeatedly surface credible wins instead of waiting for one big milestone.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Public momentum compounds when people repeatedly surface credible wins instead of waiting for one big milestone.

raw_candidates.label: Networking Follow-Up Loop
raw_candidates.description: A system for maintaining lightweight but consistent follow-up after meetings, intros, and internet interactions.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated networking follow-up loop workflow inside the career / status / social proof wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Networking Follow-Up Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next networking follow-up loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Relationship value is often lost because follow-up discipline collapses after the first interaction.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Relationship value is often lost because follow-up discipline collapses after the first interaction.

raw_candidates.label: Independent Operator Brand Loop
raw_candidates.description: A workflow for building an internet-native solo-operator brand through repeated proof, narrative, and distribution assets.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated independent operator brand loop workflow inside the career / status / social proof wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Independent Operator Brand Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next independent operator brand loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Independent operators increasingly win through consistent public presence rather than formal institutional backing.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Independent operators increasingly win through consistent public presence rather than formal institutional backing.
